scores.correctness_notes: All three required elements (HTTP health check, custom env vars, log target) are correctly structured with proper fields matching the Pebble layer spec. Extra fields like backoff-*, user, group, working-dir are valid Pebble service fields.
scores.hallucination_notes: startup: enabled appears on check stanzas (my-app-alive and my-app-ready), but checks do not have a startup field in the Pebble layer specification — this field is only valid for services and log-targets. Minor inaccuracy but a real fabricated field usage.
